ccel.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

source.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

title: Letter LV.

source.title: NPNF2-07. Cyril of Jerusalem, Gregory Nazianzen

verses.text: You flee when I pursue you: perhaps in accordance with the laws of love, to make yourself more valuable.
Come then, and fill up at last the loss I have suffered by your long delay.
And if any home affairs detain you, you shall leave us again, and so make yourself more precious as an object of desire.
